title: more crafting recipes
description: adds recipes for lots of stuff like totem of undying, trident, most of the spawn eggs, chainmail armor, all of the armor trims and more.
body:
this mod adds recipes for lots of things that are hard to get, and makes getting them easier. with 81 new recipes and one new item, it reduces the aspect of exploration from items that don't really need it that much. the mod adds recipes for:
- all chainmail armor
- trident
- totem of undying
- netherite upgrade template
- nametag
- every armor trim
- (almost) every spawn egg
- enchanted golden apple
- saddle
- cobweb

the aforementioned new item is called the "empty spawn egg", which is required for all of the spawn egg recipes. 

if you have any feedback or suggestions, let me know: [https://forms.gle/RBra4GdHR5dLBo2VA](https://forms.gle/RBra4GdHR5dLBo2VA), or if you have any other questions, just dm me on discord! username: mariofan12361
